projects.title: MedLens - Medical AR Glasses System
projects.description: MedLens is a medical facial recognition system that provides healthcare professionals with instant access to critical patient information through AR-enabled glasses, reducing medication errors and improving emergency response times.
projects.longDescription: MedLens is a healthcare innovation project that bridges augmented reality and medical data management. The system uses facial recognition to identify patients in real time and overlays critical health information — allergies, medication history, emergency contacts — directly into AR glasses worn by healthcare staff. The web platform manages patient profiles, recognition events, and medical records, with a Python/FastAPI backend handling the AI inference pipeline and Supabase for secure data storage.
features: Real-time facial recognition for patient identification
AR overlay of critical patient health data
Patient profile and medical record management
Python/FastAPI inference pipeline for face recognition
Secure medical data storage with Supabase
Designed to reduce medication errors in clinical settings

projects.title: SMA - Smart Home Automation App
projects.description: Web app that allows users to control their home devices locally and remotely.
projects.longDescription: SMA is a smart home automation web application that gives users real-time control over connected home devices from any browser. The frontend is built with React and Tailwind CSS for a fast, responsive UI, while the backend uses Express with PostgreSQL to manage device state and user data. Devices can be controlled both on the local network and remotely, with instant status feedback through the UI.
features: Real-time device control via web interface
Local and remote access support
React frontend with Tailwind CSS
Express REST API backend
PostgreSQL for persistent device state

projects.title: Modern Interactive Portfolio
projects.description: The very website you are currently exploring—a high-performance, aesthetically driven personal portfolio built with Vite and modern web standards.
projects.longDescription: This is the definitive version of my professional portfolio, engineered for speed, responsiveness, and a premium user experience. Moving beyond static foundations, this Vite-powered site features a modular architecture, glassmorphic design elements, and fluid animations. It serves as a living exhibition of my frontend mastery, showcasing my projects and technical journey through a modern, interactive interface.
features: High-performance build powered by Vite
Dynamic project filtering and detailed showcases
Premium UI with glassmorphism and smooth micro-animations
Fully responsive and SEO-optimized architecture

projects.title: StyleZa - Full-Stack E-Commerce
projects.description: Full-featured clothing store built with ASP.NET Core MVC (.NET 8). Includes customer accounts, admin dashboard, and robust product/order management.
projects.longDescription: StyleZa is a full-stack clothing e-commerce platform built with ASP.NET Core MVC targeting .NET 8. The project was developed as part of a professional training program and demonstrates production-grade patterns including clean architecture, identity-based authentication, and Entity Framework Core for data access. It features a customer-facing storefront with a modern UI and a fully-functional admin dashboard for managing products, categories, and orders.
features: ASP.NET Core Identity for authentication and authorization
Admin dashboard with full CRUD for products and orders
Shopping cart with session persistence
Category and product filtering
Responsive storefront with clean UI

projects.title: Monkeytype - Typing Speed Test Game
projects.description: One of the active contributors in the best fun and interactive typing speed test game that challenges players to improve their typing skills.
projects.longDescription: Monkeytype is one of the most popular open-source typing speed test applications on the internet, with thousands of active daily users. As a contributor, I submitted pull requests that were reviewed and merged into the main codebase, improving UI components and user-facing features. Contributing to a large-scale open source project with a rigorous review process was a valuable experience in professional collaboration and code quality standards.
features: Contributed merged pull requests to the main codebase
Improved UI components and user-facing features
Worked within a rigorous open-source review process
Collaborated with an international team of developers

projects.title: PRism — GitHub Contribution Dashboard
projects.description: A single-page dashboard that analyses a contributor's pull request history in any GitHub repository — categorising PRs by type, tracking merge ratios, and visualising contribution velocity.
projects.longDescription: PRism inspects a contributor's pull request history in any GitHub repository through the Search API. Each PR is classified by conventional-commit type (fix, feat, refactor, chore, etc.) using title pattern matching, and the dashboard reports merged / closed / open ratios alongside time-series velocity. A compare mode benchmarks two users in the same repository side-by-side, and an optional Personal Access Token unlocks the higher authenticated rate limit for analysing large repositories. Results are cached client-side so re-scans of the same repo are instant.
features: Automatic PR categorisation by conventional-commit type (fix, feat, impr, refactor, chore, docs, perf, test, build)
Merged / closed / open ratio tracking with per-status filtering
Time-series velocity charts with a bar and smooth-wave toggle
Side-by-side compare mode for two contributors in the same repository
Personal Access Token support for the higher authenticated GitHub rate limit
Client-side request cache to avoid redundant API calls on repeat scans

projects.title: GenCV — AI-Assisted CV Builder
projects.description: A browser-based CV builder with an AI editing assistant, real-time ATS scoring, and import flows that extract content from existing PDFs or pasted text.
projects.longDescription: GenCV is a web application for creating and maintaining CVs entirely in the browser. It pairs a template engine with an AI chat assistant for content suggestions and an AI-powered import flow that extracts and unifies data from an uploaded PDF or pasted plain text. A real-time ATS compatibility scorer surfaces structural and keyword issues as the document is edited. Users can switch between multiple template layouts with live preview and export the final document client-side using jsPDF. AI calls are proxied through Netlify Functions to keep API keys off the client.
features: AI chat assistant for content editing and phrasing suggestions
AI-powered import that extracts and unifies CV data from uploaded PDFs or pasted text
Real-time ATS compatibility scoring with prioritised fixes
Multiple template layouts with live preview
Client-side PDF export via jsPDF — no server round-trip
Serverless API proxy through Netlify Functions to keep keys off the client

projects.title: onTarget — Medical 3D Targeting Game
projects.description: A 3D first-person targeting game built around a medical training premise — treat diseased cells and spare healthy tissue. Runs in the browser and as a packaged desktop app via Electron.
projects.longDescription: onTarget is a 3D first-person game with a medical training premise: the player administers targeted treatment to diseased cells (red) while avoiding healthy ones (green). It is rendered with Three.js and split into two timed phases — a scattered-distribution warm-up followed by a precision-targeting round — with separate per-phase and combined scoring. The HUD reports the active phase, a 30-second timer, and live score, and a local top-scores screen persists results across sessions. The same build is wrapped with Electron and shipped as a desktop application alongside the web demo.
features: Two-phase gameplay: scattered distribution and precision targeting
30-second timer per phase with per-phase and combined scoring
Red / green target system that penalises hitting healthy cells
Local top-scores leaderboard persisted across sessions
Three.js WebGL rendering with mouse aim and click-to-fire controls
Distributed as both a browser game and an Electron desktop application

projects.title: Mr. Deli - Restaurant Website
projects.description: A modern and responsive restaurant website designed for Mr. Deli, featuring an elegant UI, interactive menu, and seamless user experience across devices.
projects.longDescription: A professional restaurant website built for Mr. Deli. The site features a carefully crafted UI with a warm aesthetic that reflects the brand identity. Visitors can explore the full menu with categories, learn about the restaurant, and find location and contact information. Built with performance and mobile responsiveness as core priorities, the site delivers a smooth experience on every device.
features: Interactive menu with category navigation
Fully responsive across all screen sizes
Brand-consistent design and color palette
Location and contact information integration
Fast-loading, optimized assets

projects.title: OnKlo - Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: The full MVC version of the Clothing Frontend Project, now a dynamic and scalable e-commerce platform.
projects.longDescription: OnKlo is a full-featured e-commerce platform for a clothing brand, evolved from a static frontend template into a robust ASP.NET MVC application. It supports the complete shopping lifecycle — browsing products by category, adding items to cart, checkout with order tracking, and user account management. The admin panel allows full product and inventory control, order management, and customer oversight.
features: Product catalog with category filtering and search
Shopping cart and checkout flow
User accounts with order history
Admin panel for product and order management
Responsive design across all devices

projects.title: Movie Rating Website Platform
projects.description: An advanced, full-featured movie rating and review platform built with .NET MVC.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive movie rating and review web platform built with ASP.NET MVC, designed to give users a complete cinema discovery experience. Users can search and browse movies, submit detailed reviews with star ratings, and build personal watchlists. The platform includes a full admin panel for content moderation and movie management, along with role-based access control to separate standard users from moderators and admins.
features: User authentication with role-based access control
Movie search, filtering, and detailed info pages
Star rating system with written reviews
Personal watchlists and review history
Admin dashboard for content management
